text: or recovery of the suit promissory note debt together with interest. Even though the interest is compound interest @ 18% P.A. The plaintiff is claiming simple interest @18% P.A. iii. The defendant is not entitled to any debt relief acts 45/87 or 2/90. 7. PARTICULARS OF SUIT CLAIM: Principal amount under the suit Promissory Note Dt.29-10-2021 ------ 10,00,000-00 Simple interest claimed at 18% P.A. ------ 1,20,000-00 Form 29-10-2021 to 28-06-2022 Total ------ 11,20,000-00 (Rupees Eleven Lakhs and Twenty thousand only) 6. Cause of Action: for the suit arose on 29-10-2021 when the defendant executed a demand promissory note for an amount of Rs: 10,00,000/- (Rupees Ten Lakhs only) @ 18% P.A. comp
